company_overview.primary_theme: Strong demand for iPhone 17 and services driving record revenue.

guidance.full_year: up to 12% jump in overall revenue
guidance.reason_for_change: strong demand for iPhone 17 and services

causal_claims.claim: Strong demand for iPhone 17 is driving sales and revenue expectations past Wall Street estimates.

high_signal_summary: Apple reported record revenue of $102.5 billion.
iPhone 17 demand is expected to drive double-digit sales growth.
Services revenue showed robust growth, aided by AI integration.
Management raised guidance for the upcoming quarter.
Strong performance in both iPhone and services segments.
Stock rose 3.7% in after-hours trading post-earnings.
Apple continues to outperform Wall Street estimates.
CEO Tim Cook highlighted strong early demand in key markets.
Ongoing supply issues are being addressed.
Apple's earnings beat expectations despite challenges.
